name: Naomi Judd's Chicken Continental
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cream of Mushroom soup (10 oz)
2 cups Cooked Brown or yellow rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat dry.
2. Saute the chicken in butter in an ovenproof skillet until browned, then remove to a plate.
3. Add the soup to the skillet and stir to deglaze.
4. Stir in celery flakes, thyme, salt, cooked rice, and chicken broth.
5. Arrange the chicken on top of the mixture.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, adding more chicken broth if needed for desired consistency.
